evidence: Shivam: 'instead of just sharing resumes... we want to go up the value chain and potentially leverage career span if it can integrate into the workflow... a customer, they get a lot more visibility than just a Resume and a LinkedIn they get this more holistic picture'

Shivam: 'you know, people say outsourcing, but it's a full captive center that the US company owns and is operating... it's something called capability centers. If you saw recently Harvey AI Anthropic OpenAI are building teams in India'
Shivam: 'This JD then create a job description or a role in Career Span... Roles start getting routed to different team engineers'
Shivam: 'today and tomorrow I'm going to actively start messaging first 15 engineers in my pool... and start bringing to the Career Span platform'

V: 'for us we're really in need of like exhibiting the product and I think this will be a really great way to showcase that... we're trying to sell this sucker... or at least we're trying to like get Ilsa and I sold'
V: 'we'll make sure to sort of figure out a way to grandfather you guys in one way or the other... for us that's sort of the main thing is, is getting us as an exhibition'
V: 'More so the candidate side... I mean the company side is like great. But if we don't have to deal with it, we really would rather not. We would rather just help [candidates]'

Ilse: 'hey, we get that this is annoying or weird or not what you're used to, but people hiring in America have expectations that you can talk about yourself like this... it's practice. Sorry, you just gotta do it.'
V: 'we already have an in with Marvin. We have a partnership. We're allowed to go to those founders. Like you know, I think there's a way for us to both... essentially get exposure'

Ilse: 'what we're doing is we'll go through all of them and if you have some engineers that are good at Rails, some engineers that are good at .Net... it's not going to expose that role to the Rails engineers. It's just going to be okay, not worth your time. We're only going to show this to the people who are clearly a very good fit'
V: 'we're basically not optimizing for revenue. So there's flexibility as long as we can sort of cover our bases and advertise the... out of it'

V: 'I have largely finalized the one pagers... These are the overall argument that we're making and the sort of like proof points that we'll be using... I will start getting those one pagers out on mass today. That's pretty much it... getting hands about like 30, maybe 30ish people'
V: 'actually I think that'll be theoretically should be a really good case study because they want expedience over all else so they'll be pretty much like pushing folks to use it'

Ilse: 'I'm adding some stuff to the user's settings page that actually lets them control whether or not they want to be included in job search stuff because before now it's just been the toggle during sign up and you could never change it again'
